reviews.comment:
Cuántas veces por semana cargan combustible? Y después, recién para que la atención no sea con mala cara, desgranada, que haya conexión, etc.

(Translated by Google)
How many times a week do they refuel? And only then, so that the service isn't unfriendly, unprofessional, and there's a connection, etc.

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio del ACA muy cerca de la Ruta A 09 en San Pedro, al cruce del rio Tala
No pertenece al YPF Full con lo cual no podés pagar con la app YPF si vas a comer o tomar algo.
La atención de la cajera del ServiClub fue muy "amarga", nada cordial (2025-03-25, 16:30 hs)
Si se acepta la app YPF para pagar en los surtidores de combustible

(Translated by Google)
A good ACA gas station very close to Route A-09 in San Pedro, at the Tala River crossing.
It's not part of the YPF Full program, so you can't pay with the YPF app if you're going to eat or drink.
The ServiClub cashier's service was very "sour," not very friendly (2025-03-25, 4:30 PM).
The YPF app is accepted for payment at fuel pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNN3JxOEtnEAE
